  в”‚
  в”‚ # Signal conversation finality

в—Џ Done. Here's what happened:

   1. Created hub with two peers вЂ” design-hawk (design principles) and code-osprey
  (engineering)
   2. Set the goal and started conversation conv_01KQPMH5DRPWGFFYX8EAXR1JQW
   3. Delegated via hub/send with ordered tokens вЂ” design-hawk responded first, then
  code-osprey
   4. Both responded (round resolved: 2/2)
   5. Synthesized into a final markdown widget (markdown-i5p5bp) connected to my
  terminal

  The markdown covers design principles (tokens, taxonomy, contribution models,
  governance) and engineering foundations (monorepo, semver, testing,
  framework-agnostic core, DX). It's visible on the canvas below my terminal widget.
